settings.title: Fifteen Years On, We Are Fitting Free Radiators
settings.excerpt: To mark the anniversary we teamed up with a local charity to put working heating into three homes that had none.
settings.body:
Pipeworks turns fifteen this year. Rather than print mugs, we asked a local housing charity where the real need was. We expected a long list. The answer came back as a single word.

The answer was heating. Over the spring we fitted radiators and serviced boilers in three homes where families had been getting through winter on a single plug-in heater. A plug-in heater warms one room and runs up a frightening bill doing it, so a working system changes daily life, not just the temperature.

How it came together

Our suppliers chipped in the parts at cost when they heard the plan, which let us stretch the work further than we had hoped. What started as one home quietly became three once the merchants got involved. We did the labour, they covered the materials, and the charity found the families who needed it most.

  • Three homes brought up to a working heating system
  • Boilers serviced and made safe at the same time
  • Parts supplied at cost by local merchants

None of these jobs were complicated. They were the sort of work we do every week. The difference was who it was for, and knowing that a child would not be doing homework in a coat next December.

Fifteen years of unblocking drains and chasing leaks, and this was the proudest week of the lot. Thank you to everyone who has had us round in that time. You are the reason we were still here to do it.
